subject: Get Ready for Gov. Holcomb's State of the State, Part 3
body:
Tomorrow (at 7pm ET), Governor Eric Holcomb will deliver his fourth State of the State Address...

http://indiana.gop/congressofcounties?mc_cid=9434a06eb6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Get Ready for Governor Holcomb's
State of the State Address
Looking Back on 2019

Good evening!

Tomorrow (at 7 p.m. ET), Governor Eric Holcomb will deliver his fourth State of the State Address. As we’ve done the last few days, today we’re taking a look back at one of Eric’s previous State of the State Addresses. Putting People First and delivering results matter to this governor, and he’s delivered every year he’s been in office.

Below is a sampling of the big goals and big results he laid out and won for Hoosiers in his 2019 address.

Governor Holcomb’s 2019 State of the State Address: January 15, 2019:

Goal: “I will once again pursue exempting military pensions from our state income taxes so we can attract and retain talented patriotic veterans.”
* Result: Veterans will no longer pay state taxes (https://www.wthr.com/article/indiana-veterans-will-no-longer-pay-state-taxes-retirement-income?mc_cid=9434a06eb6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) on retirement income, fully effective by 2024.

Goal: “The internet is just as essential to our prosperity today as highways were a century ago, and we have far too many Hoosiers without access to affordable high-speed broadband.”
* Result: Governor Holcomb announces first $28.4 million (of $100 million) for broadband expansion. (http://thestatehousefile.com/next-level-broadband-project-awarded-additional-funding/40339/?mc_cid=9434a06eb6&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Goal: “A strong economy depends on a world-class workforce. That workforce depends on a great education. A great education depends on great teachers.”
* Result: The Next Level Teacher Pay Commission (https://www.in.gov/gov/teachercompensation.htm?mc_cid=9434a06eb6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) was created to find innovative solutions to make teacher pay more competitive. In addition, Governor Holcomb instructed the state to pay off $150 million in local school pension liabilities, which freed up funds to give teachers a well-deserved raise.

Goal: “Given the urgency around strengthening our workforce, we can’t afford to overlook anyone, especially those who want to earn a second chance.”
* Result: Governor Holcomb brings The Last Mile program (http://www.wbiw.com/2019/08/26/gov-holcomb-celebrates-graduates-of-the-last-mile/?mc_cid=9434a06eb6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to Indiana’s Department of Correction, giving offenders the opportunity to learn new skills and reduce recidivism.

Goal: “I look forward to working with (the General Assembly), with moms and dads, and schools (on school safety) as the days ahead unfold.”
* Result: Historic education funding (https://www.heraldbulletin.com/news/state_news/gov-holcomb-touts-historic-education-funding/article_509c1a6a-b251-5414-88ac-b18d401efbd6.html?mc_cid=9434a06eb6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) includes $19 million for enhanced school safety.

Goal: “Indiana is one of five states that does not yet have a bias crimes law. It’s time for us to move off that list.”
* Result: Indiana now off the list (https://www.wibc.com/blogs/abdul-large/indiana-makes-federal-hate-crimes-list?mc_cid=9434a06eb6&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) of states without bias crimes protection.

Of course, this is just a sampling of State of the State results Governor Holcomb delivered for Hoosiers in 2019. His full 2019 address can be read and viewed by clicking here. (https://www.in.gov/gov/3027.htm?mc_cid=9434a06eb6&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Thank you, Cory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

When I first got to Washington in 2009, they told me, "If you want a friend here, get a dog."

I already had a dog.

What I didn't have, until he arrived in 2013, was a friend like Cory Booker.

We're lucky to have him in the Senate, and I'm grateful for moments we shared on the campaign trail.

As many of you know, this morning, Cory suspended his campaign for president.

This is a sad moment: Cory is as true a public servant as you'll find anywhere, and he made this race more compassionate and optimistic. I look forward to many more years of his inspired leadership.

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabdf/134673f2/809686e/69977fe6/1504449556/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_011320_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
While some of the most qualified and valuable voices in this race have been cut due to arbitrary debate requirements, others have been allowed on the stage simply by virtue of their bank accounts.

Now, more than ever, we cannot give up our fight.

Our shared values brought Cory and I together in friendship, and I hope those values will inspire you to continue supporting this campaign.

Thank you,

Michael

---

name: Sara 2020
subject: Not a single witness. Not John Bolton. Not Mick Mulvaney. No one.
body:
McConnell can get away with this because of Collins' support.

Big news -
We just got word that opening arguments in the Senate impeachment trial will begin **NEXT TUESDAY. **
And still, Mitch McConnell has refused to commit to calling a single witness. Not John Bolton. Not Mick Mulvaney. No one.
**He can get away with that because of Susan Collins ' support. It's time to replace her with someone who will stand up for what's right:**
[**Rush a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign if you want a Senator who will stand up to McConnell and demand a fair trial.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e85/4bef7a87/6ac036e9/287f826d/2233430334/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTMtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200113-2-full")

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Jim Oberweis is back again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
You might remember Republican Jim Oberweis -- he ran against me in 2014 and lost.
Now, he's back, and he's challenging my friend, Democrat Lauren Underwood, for her seat in Congress. And he just launched $30,000 worth of dishonest attack ads against her.
**[Peter, Lauren needs us standing with her now more than ever. Will you contribute $5 to help defend a Democratic champion for Illinois' families?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-underwood?refcode=em200113i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Lauren is the youngest African American woman to ever serve Illinois in Congress. She is a registered nurse who served in the Obama Administration and helped implement the Affordable Care Act. That's why she's fighting as hard as she can to protect affordable health care -- and that's why the GOP will stop at nothing to defeat her and elect a hardline conservative instead.
We can't afford to lose Lauren's voice in Congress, so I'm asking for your support right now:
**[Pitch in $5 now to help re-elect our Democratic champion, Lauren Underwood.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-underwood?refcode=em200113i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-underwood?refcode=em200113i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

But we can't stop now, and that's why we need every supporter to join the fight... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bb53/45c30650/1ecb14e82/66ff29e9/1931511144/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

In just three days, early voting will begin, and voters across America will be able to cast a ballot for Elizabeth.

**This is a big deal.** It's why we're organizing in all 50 states, D.C., and Puerto Rico -- because every person, every town, and every community's voice matters.

And as people start to cast ballots for the presidency, we need to be in the strongest position possible to carry our movement forward. **That's why we're asking for your help -- because we need to reach our goal of raising $750,000 in the next 3 days.**

[**Can you chip in $2 or anything you can to help reach our goal?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bb53/45c30650/1ecb14e82/66ff29eb/1931511144/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU41MEZfTU1HX0dSTV9QXzIwMjAwMTEzX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN50F_MMG_GRM_P_20200113_V1S1_P") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Across the country, volunteers who are all in for Elizabeth are knocking doors, talking to their friends and family about our movement, and making the case for big, structural change in their communities.

And with just a couple more days until early voting begins, we're beginning to see our hard work pay off. **But we can't stop now, and that's why we need every supporter to join the fight.**

[**We wouldn't be asking if it wasn't important. Can you chip in for the first time today to help reach our goal of $750,000 and help Elizabeth and our movement cross the finish line?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bb53/45c30650/1ecb14e82/66ff29eb/1931511144/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU41MEZfTU1HX0dSTV9QXzIwMjAwMTEzX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN50F_MMG_GRM_P_20200113_V1S1_P")

Thanks for your help,

Team Warren

body:
| | | |

---
Hi there, We are so grateful for the warm messages this team has sent Tom as he prepares to take the debate stage. Your support is so inspiring:
---
_Tom, you bring a message that needs to be heard. Thank you for your courage and action, and for the long hours you are putting in to get this message out. You are unstoppable. — Tom, NC_

_You have my support in the upcoming election! I think you are not only the best Democratic candidate to beat Trump, but the best person to lead our country! Thank you for all you are doing and good luck!!! — Jordan, IA_

_Dear Tom, You have been an inspiration to many of us and you truly embody the spirit of our democracy. Make us all proud as you stand for what's right. We stand with you. — Linda, TX_

---

subject: Come Join Dan for Happy Hour
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Dan wants to meet you!

Dan is having a Happy Hour and meet and greet on Wednesday, January 22nd, and he wants you to attend. Please join us for what should be a fun event while supporting Dan’s re-election campaign!

Please see below for more details, and then RSVP by clicking here [http://eventbrite.com/e/happy-hour-reception-with-congressman-dan-lipinski-tickets-89656907223?aff=ebdssbdestsearch] .

Meet and Greet with Dan Lipinski
Wednesday, January 22nd, 6 PM — 8 PM
Black Horizon Brewing Company
7560 South Quincy Street
Willowbrook, IL 60527

Click here [http://eventbrite.com/e/happy-hour-reception-with-congressman-dan-lipinski-tickets-89656907223?aff=ebdssbdestsearch] to RSVP by buying a ticket or come Wednesday and buy a ticket at the door.

Hope to see you there,
Team Lipinski

P.S. If you can’t make it to our event at Black Horizon Brewing Company, there is still time to get involved with the campaign. Visit www.lipinskiforcongress.com [http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com] for more information.

Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. We are grateful for your support. Please take a moment to like Dan on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/danlipinskiforcongress/] or follow Dan on Twitter [https://twitter.com/DanLipinski] . If you’d like to contribute to help Dan keep fighting in Congress, you can click here to support Dan’s reelection now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-general?refcode=footer&amount=20&recurring=auto]

PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check Up with Dr. Manny! 1/13
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Happy Monday! I hope the beginning of 2020 has started out well for you. It sure has been a busy first few weeks, but I'm excited to be all over the state meeting with so many of you! I had a busy week last week and made some great campaign stops. I stopped in Putnam County, White County, Overton County, Pickett County, Fentress County and finally my hometown in Coffee County for an outstanding event as the County GOP opened their office! Thank you for your support! Looking forward to next week on the campaign trail. I hope to see you out there. **Media: ** My mom and I always enjoy going back to visit where I grew up in Coffee County. Thank you to everyone for coming out and supporting me at the Grand Opening of the new county party headquarters! I'm so proud to have grown up in Coffee County and loved coming back to share why I am running for US Senate. Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhphkyd-uunkhiuw-y/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhphkyd-uunkhiuw-j/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhphkyd-uunkhiuw-t/)! Also be sure to tag us on any social media for your chance to be featured in our Check-Up with Dr. Manny. Help me today by signing up or donating through my website, [DrMannyforSenate.com.](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhphkyd-uunkhiuw-i/) [Pick up your Dr. Manny gear today! We have t-shirts, koozies, and bumper stickers available with a donation. ](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhphkyd-uunkhiuw-d/) We have just 7 months until the primary election. I can't do this without your support. Let's roll to victory and make a bigger difference! Dr. Manny P.S. ---

**BREAKING: NANCY PELOSI ANNOUNCES VOTE TO SEND ARTICLES OF IMPEACHMENT TO THE SENATE TOMORROW**

Friend,

Well it's about time.

Nancy and her Liberal Puppets IMPEACHED ME a month ago and have since been holding the Articles of Impeachment HOSTAGE.

She just announced Democrats in the House will vote on sending the Impeachment Articles to the Senate tomorrow, where this HOAX will finally go to trial and show the world who she really is: _a LYING and MANIPULATIVE HYPOCRITE_ who never had any evidence of wrongdoing against me.

**I DID NOTHING WRONG. READ THE TRANSCRIPT.**

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: Combat Veterans for Congress Endorsement
body:
Dear Friends,

I am very honored to announce my latest endorsement, [**Combat Veterans for Congress**. ](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/54071828:WbNi8wvNO:m:1:2214761648:250E5559F640819855BC8099BC364EFD:r)

_The Combat Veterans For Congress Committee is dedicated to supporting the election of fiscally conservative Combat Veterans to Congress. We seek Combat Veterans For Congress who believe in limited government, will rein in the out of control spending of Congress, are committed to preserving and defending the US Constitution, and will support the independence and freedom of the individual as outlined in the Bill of Rights. _

_The Combat Veterans For Congress PAC is endorsing the 127 th Combat Veteran For Congress in 10 years; SPC Aleksander Skarlatos, USANG is a fiscally conservative candidate who will work to rein in the out of control spending by irresponsible members of Congress, work toward reducing the national debt, support strengthening the US military, will support the Freedom of Speech, and Religion, protect and support the 2nd Amendment's Right to Bear Arms, support closing the southern borders, and support the Free Enterprise System to stimulate private sector business development. _
_ _
It was an honor to serve my country in the military and I am looking forward to serve this county in Congress. If you would like to stand with this PAC endorsement please show your support and [donate to our campaign today](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/54071829:WbNi8wvNO:m:1:2214761648:250E5559F640819855BC8099BC364EFD:r)!
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/54071829:WbNi8wvNO:m:1:2214761648:250E5559F640819855BC8099BC364EFD:r)

Let's Go,
Alek Skarlatos

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/54071830:WbNi8wvNO:m:1:2214761648:250E5559F640819855BC8099BC364EFD:r)
|
| Paid for Alek for Oregon

Y’all. We’ve raised $2,065 in the last 5 days! That’s over a third of the $6,000 needed to fund DIG2020. If we reach our goal, a generous donor has agreed to match it - putting us at the $12,000 needed to cover all data acquisitions for 2020. We’re so appreciative to everyone who has donated. Thank you!
Now we just have to raise the other $3,935 and our data needs will be fully funded for 2020. Can you help us out today?

Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
P.S. If you’d like a more comprehensive explanation of DIG2020, and how it will help Tennessee Democrats in 2020 please keep reading.
*******************************************************
DIG2020: A DATA ENHANCEMENT PROJECT
FOR TENNESSEE DEMOCRATS
The mission of the Tennessee Democratic Party is to elect Democrats at every level of government. Often, the difference between winning and losing comes down to data. How we collect, manage, and utilize information about volunteers, supporters, and voters will determine the direction and effectiveness of our organizing and electoral efforts. Accurate contact info increases connect rates and call time efficiency, allowing us to reach more potential activists and volunteers (for voter registration and other Party-building activities), target persuasive messaging, and mobilize voters in less time. Since Tennessee doesn’t affiliate voters with a party during registration, knowing who voted Democrat in past races and primaries is paramount to our efforts.
WHAT IS DIG2020?
DIG2020 is a data enhancement and hygiene project for the VOTEBUILDER Voter Contact Management System. Operated by the Tennessee Democratic Party, VOTEBUILDER is the only electronic voter database in Tennessee with access to the data and upgrades available from the Democratic National Committee (DNC).
VOTEBUILDER isn’t just a voting record. It also contains a wealth of additional information about registered voters in every election district in the state, including additional consumer enhancements and modeling.
VOTEBUILDER can be used on any computer or handheld device to identify and target voters, create lists for walking, mailing, or phone banking, and to store voter survey information.
TNDP staff provides campaigns with professional and responsive support to
effectively use VOTEBUILDER to win elections.
DIG2020 COST
Cost: $12,000 (Paid in advance to cover 12 separate data acquisitions)
In past years, the TNDP would obtain new and updated voter data from the Tennessee Secretary of State’s office QUARTERLY to send to the DNC. In 2020, our aim is to obtain voter data monthly.
Information is power, and in this case that power comes with a price tag of $12,000, paid in advance to cover 12 separate data acquisitions over the course of 2020.
A generous donor has pledged $6,000 in matching funds for this project. Please consider making a donation today so we can take advantage of this offer and fund our data!

subject: When will it end?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CMDU977qgp_nOfCPNZDuR7SqjEvCZ-GrU6yalbsFqfjv5GUlOJWN54S6JMCgzokRJsQXUn2pbAFnlZdDlichh2mcR_Y8PbrNwstBMgU4_oZETB-jVOvmOHISI-fT8k1QEW4HjiKRD4dYTTqhgYKU7bm_5dLe4_KTX2k5EOu8xm4Rq_zuLm0pBw==&c=XlGOUzc11YbQmf1x20ZaqE1vj6QCTYt8Z2t10cLKqsNIqzD17ra0iw==&ch=vUa3Lu9vCXr0g-YvUwJG6jV5CtvsJiIF_ZGI5k6-7uyxi-1Ekdkvpw==)
---
| Patriot,
Even though the Socialist Democrats know that the impeachment process dies at the steps of the Senate building, they continue to push forward with their witch hunt.
They continue to drag President Trump and the American people through their counterfeit impeachment process, using the Democrat Communications Department (the mainstream fake news media) to continue to deceive the country every step of the way.
They show no signs of stopping this charade.
Unfortunately for them, I will never stop defending President Trump and will personally see to it that he exits this nightmare unscathed and gets reelected to a second term.
---

name: Jason Yates
subject: Pelosi has blocked this 80 times - you can do something about it.
body:
| | Peter, Nancy Pelosi, and the Democrats in the House, have blocked the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act from a vote 80 times. You read that number right. **This legislation would stop infanticide and require medical care and treatment to be provided to babies who survive abortions and are born alive.** However, Republicans, and three Democrats in the House, have not given up. Congressman Steve Scalise and Congresswoman Ann Wagner put forward a discharge petition. If 218 members of Congress sign it, Speaker Pelosi would be forced to move the bill out of committee and schedule the bill for a vote on the House floor. **In the first few days of 2020, tremendous new progress towards this goal is being made.** Congressman Van Drew, a Democrat turned Republican just last month, signed the petition on January 7 bringing the total number of signatures to 204, only 14 signatures shy of the requirement. This is where you come in. **[Will you stand with us right now and send a powerful message urging the other 231 members to sign the petition](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ChoLRUtb0vrdfodIM5dSpfZeoogYc43kwmMFB_Jqoeg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200114p2a01&n=1)?** Every member of the House of Representatives is facing re-election in November. Christians hold immense voting power. Together, in one united voice, we will let these representatives know that we are not afraid to use it. They are playing a dangerous partisan game when they hold bills hostage and refuse to let Congress vote. This effort to silence 204 members of Congress is an effort to silence Americans. **[Please take just a minute and use our easy tool to urge 14 more members of Congress to sign the petition](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ChoLRUtb0vrdfodIM5dSpfZeoogYc43kwmMFB_Jqoeg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200114p2a01&n=2).** Speaker Pelosi must be held accountable for these partisan political games. Americans deserve to know which members of Congress vote to endorse infanticide, and who is willing to stand up against evil. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ChoLRUtb0vrdfodIM5dSpfZeoogYc43kwmMFB_Jqoeg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200114p2a01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200114p2a01&n=4)

subject: 🚨 Special Election Alert 🚨
body:
**Special Election Alert** Derek, In exactly one week Republican voters in Hooksett will go to the polls in the special primary to nominate a State Representative to replace late Republican Representative Dick Marple. We at the NHGOP are committed to maintaining control of that seat in the general election on March 10th. Republicans in the NH House have been pushing back against a wave of proposals that will increase taxes, restrict your Second Amendment Rights, and weaken elections. We have barely enough votes to sustain Governor Sununu’s vetoes on the Democrats destructive legislation. name: Yang2020 HQ
subject: Now or never
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5855%2E377263%2EIjsELm) Yang Gang --

Tonight will be the first time Andrew isn’t on a debate stage. It will also be the first time when no candidates of color qualified to participate.

**That’s because the DNC’s rules weren’t written for us -- they were written for politicians and billionaires.**

Andrew is neither of those things and that’s what makes this campaign so powerful. We aren’t finished -- and we have a plan to get Andrew to the White House.

**But the truth is, the media, establishment, and everyone watching will use what we fundraise by tonight to measure the strength of our campaign. So we need you to give it all you can TODAY.

[Yang Gang, can you rush $10 or more right now to show everyone the strength of our campaign? Make sure we hit this $2 million goal by midnight.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21834?t=5&akid=5855%2E377263%2EIjsELm)** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21834?t=6&akid=5855%2E377263%2EIjsELm)
---
Debates are important -- but votes are decisive.

And with just a few short weeks until the first votes are cast, the focus must shift to our field programs in Iowa and New Hampshire. We have to give it our all and double down on our resources in the early states.

**It’s now or never.

[Go all in on our Humanity First vision and donate $10 or more to make this a show-stopping fundraising day, and help us hit the goal.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21834?t=7&akid=5855%2E377263%2EIjsELm)**

We need Andrew’s bold vision so we can rewrite the rules and build a nation that puts humanity first.

Your support is vital to our success, so thank you for everything you do.

Yang2020 HQ

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Protecting coverage for pre-existing conditions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
There’s only one party that will protect health insurance coverage for people with pre-existing conditions, friend, and it’s not the one Donald Trump wants you to think it is.
If Donald Trump and David Perdue get their way, 4,316,000 Georgians living with pre-existing conditions could lose their care or see their rates skyrocket as a result.
Perdue is proud of his voting record. He has repeatedly voted to undermine health insurance for the most vulnerable, including to allow junk insurance plans on the market that offer no coverage for people with pre-existing conditions — even denying insurance to women who are pregnant.
These are the actions of someone who is not protecting Georgians, but the profits of insurance companies. If you’re with me in the fight to put people before profits in Congress, then I’m asking if you’ll make a donation to our people-powered campaign to #SendPerduePacking. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-jan-20?refcode=em011420-a&noskip=true&refcode2=2752a17e-0a37-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f]
We need to build on the Affordable Care Act by expanding Medicaid to 500,000+ Georgians and establish a public option to achieve universal healthcare coverage.
But that won’t happen as long as Republicans control the Senate and Perdue sells off his votes to the special interests who finance his campaigns — like at the $100,000-per-plate fundraiser Trump co-hosted with him weeks ago.
To flip the Senate we have to win Georgia, where polling has our race within single digits. If we do that, we will not only secure Democratic control of the White House and Senate — we will transform the political landscape across our country for years to come.
I’m relying on grassroots donations to take the fight to David Perdue. Rush in a contribution today and help me fight for universal healthcare for all Americans. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-jan-20?refcode=em011420-a&noskip=true&refcode2=2752a17e-0a37-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f]

clean_body: There’s only one party that will protect health insurance coverage for people with pre-existing conditions, friend, and it’s not the one Donald Trump wants you to think it is. If Donald Trump and David Perdue get their way, 4,316,000 Georgians living with pre-existing conditions could lose their care or see their rates skyrocket as a result. Perdue is proud of his voting record. He has repeatedly voted to undermine health insurance for the most vulnerable, including to allow junk insurance plans on the market that offer no coverage for people with pre-existing conditions — even denying insurance to women who are pregnant. These are the actions of someone who is not protecting Georgians, but the profits of insurance companies. If you’re with me in the fight to put people before profits in Congress, then I’m asking if you’ll make a donation to our people-powered campaign to #SendPerduePacking. [] We need to build on the Affordable Care Act by expanding Medicaid to 500,000+ Georgians and establish a public option to achieve universal healthcare coverage. But that won’t happen as long as Republicans control the Senate and Perdue sells off his votes to the special interests who finance his campaigns — like at the $100,000-per-plate fundraiser Trump co-hosted with him weeks ago. To flip the Senate we have to win Georgia, where polling has our race within single digits. If we do that, we will not only secure Democratic control of the White House and Senate — we will transform the political landscape across our country for years to come. I’m relying on grassroots donations to take the fight to David Perdue. Rush in a contribution today and help me fight for universal healthcare for all Americans. [] If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: [] [] [] [] [] [] Thank you — your support is continuing to drive us forward. Yours truly, Teresa PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 DONATE []

In a moment we're going to ask you to make a contribution toward our mid-month fundraising goal of $750,000 but first, can we explain why it's so important?

The Iowa caucuses are less than three weeks away. And things are only going to move even more quickly after that.

We need to be spending every second we can knocking doors, making calls, turning out our supporters and welcoming new ones into the fold -- **all of which is only possible thanks to the generous contributions of people like you.**

Every single dollar we raise is going to help get our message of big, structural change out to caucus-goers and voters -- and getting our message out there is how we'll win this. That's what Elizabeth will be doing on the debate stage tonight, and what we're doing in communities all across the country.

We asked for your help raising $750,000 before mid-month so we could stay on track toward hitting our fundraising goals -- to help fund our important advertising and organizing programs.

**With Elizabeth headed back out to the debate stage tonight, this is the perfect time to make a contribution to help her win.**[**Chip in now before tonight's debate so we'll be able to share the good news with Elizabeth before she goes out on the stage -- and we'll send you a free sticker as a thank you.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a49a/45c30650/1ec9ed8d9/66ffdad2/3201177394/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXZvdGluZy1zdGsiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTjUzRl9NTUdfR0JOX1dfMjAyMDAxMTRfVjFTM19QX1QyIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-voting-stk?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN53F_MMG_GBN_W_20200114_V1S3_P_T2")

Friend,

We have HUGE news — Governor Holcomb is one step closer to making Indiana’s 2020 gubernatorial ballot!
[ **Donate now and help us keep up our momentum** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=775e30a013134aa698a3d9b741969ae1&_e=ffrvC8XZHGQ3rzjJteQ7JSwNzB0Y846KjKwjqh4rSl-o14DhlJk0qKwrmip8svLLwPbPRMRs7VCsd4DRLZ9mVlpJi9OfSXk8XaOm_JWe6u15KRs-iXDPVjhh1wqPZ6MROgydsh7SgsroMiYSRHX5cTsZcpJ54B5Btr7wB4qtvLT4ZKDm4od3Ac6ygMZyAhh4AzqdN1bZ1rQ-4RKIWwyEyFnA4pSwY4K7RFk81TDHL6EFBa9HkCY90VNy5eM03Ge8wZk_qcj5wDR5PeAYx3hLtIO0yzfvvAHFn9aCdsq77h84QnzV7Wpi8Z0Y-pk8xIzJDtYryBJDyHhaJ03n_bV2Xhdc2NhC9BoA4ZGePoVV0KrGozznRY1fXuUKQB-vi2ghcxK0kJxMhxWF-Vt8cDWoDUgbw639AlqFQHoD-LqR2qU%3D)
Thanks to the hard work of this team throughout the entire state, we more than doubled the minimum number of ballot petition signatures required (4,500). **Our team has filed more than 9,000 signatures from Hoosiers...with Hoosiers signing from ALL 92 counties. Enough of those signatures have now been certified by clerks in EVERY district!**

name: Tim Walz
subject: Add your name: It’s time for a historic investment in affordable housing
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, Every Minnesotan deserves a safe, affordable place to live. Yet as I travel our state, I hear from far too many who are struggling to find housing they can afford, especially in the communities they call home, near their work, school, and loved ones. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/XJJMPgNAbaZ8AvFaNwXnSKj-MvwpIjiJDYNId65RFTM=/cuAQSvXhy0dtYX18MeTm9H8w9j6k7yLMEh5CZhGwRCw=)
---
My friend,
Every Minnesotan deserves a safe, affordable place to live.
Yet as I travel our state, I hear from far too many who are struggling to find housing they can afford, especially in the communities they call home, near their work, school, and loved ones.
**That 's why, as part of my Local Jobs and Projects Plan, I've proposed a record $276 million for safe, affordable housing projects across our state.**
My proposal would create a full range of housing choices in every corner of Minnesota, including supportive housing for people experiencing homelessness, senior housing, family housing, new homeownership opportunities, and veteran housing.
It's time to address this need that all Minnesotans know is real. Raise your voice to help us build support ahead of this year's legislative session.
[**Add your name: It 's time for a historic investment in safe, affordable housing for Minnesotans.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/XJJMPgNAbaZ8AvFaNwXnSKj-MvwpIjiJDYNId65RFTM=/cuAQSvXhy0dtYX18MeTm9H8w9j6k7yLMEh5CZhGwRCw=)

This is how we build One Minnesota. Thank you for helping us get the job done.
I'm grateful,
Tim Walz

name: U.S. Senator Ed Markey
subject: A new Four Freedoms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
We must have a new Four Freedoms, to guide us now and in the years ahead.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df98/693b8b0a/434f185f/72de7472/3749124260/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
This week, I proposed that we apply FDR's Four Freedoms to a new vision that will address today's challenges and move our country from peril to progress.
We must have a new Four Freedoms, to guide us now and in the years ahead.
**Freedom from war**
We cannot escalate tensions in Iran and the Middle East more broadly -- and certainly not without Congressional authorization. Our goal always must be peace and security.
**Freedom from our climate crisis**
This is the economic, national security, health, and moral issue of our time. That's why I partnered with Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez on the Green New Deal, a resolution based on FDR's historic agenda.
We can create jobs and justice and avert global disaster. Without collective action at this scale, our planet is doomed.
**Freedom from gun violence**
Too many people lose their lives to the scourge of gun violence in this country. We need bold solutions that will save lives and end this epidemic once and for all. We must ban assault weapons, pass universal background checks, and close the gun show loophole.
Together, we can take on and defeat the gun lobby. The NRA will be Not Relevant Anymore in American politics.
**Freedom from social injustice and inequality**
There is an assault on our shared values of justice and equality. That assault is led by forces fueled by lies, racism, sexism, xenophobia, and fear.
We must stand together, reject hate, and demand equality and justice for all.
I cannot turn this vision into a reality alone. We must fight together. It is only through collective action that we can overcome the forces that seek to stop our progress and provide the universal freedom promised to the people of this country.
[**If you are with me in this fight, please make a $3 donation to our campaign today. History has taught us that seismic change does not happen overnight or from the top down. Your support will help me continue building the grassroots movement that we will need to win.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df98/693b8b0a/434f185f/72de7471/3749124260/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTQtYyJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200114-c")
This election, we must recommit ourselves to the freedoms that truly matter. The freedoms that we have fought for in the past and those that are being challenged today. Now is our time to strive for, as FDR said, "a better life, a better world, beyond the horizon."
\- Ed Markey
**[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df98/693b8b0a/434f185f/72de7471/3749124260/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTQtYyJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200114-c")**

* * *
Paid for by The Markey Committee
---

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Senator Ed Markey with a contribution, [click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df98/693b8b0a/434f185f/72de7477/3749124260/VEsD/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_footer").

| Hi Team,

Michael was on MSNBC's _Last Word with Lawrence O 'Donnell_ last night. He had a lot to say:

[Voters in New Hampshire are more undecided today than they were six weeks ago or six months ago. He's the only candidate in this race to have won two tough races in a purple swing state, and as other candidates focus on empty promises, he's held 33 town halls in New Hampshire in the last five weeks to answer every last question and tell the truth.

subject: Kicking off the New Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
As we start off the New Year, I wanted to update you on what our campaign has accomplished in the first two weeks of 2020. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IAE/ni0YAA/t.2ye/HXkU6LYFScKSZx0eqmcNYA/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRIc8ctk0G-2B84LyI4ptr1FZgOUwMHXR7BfqLPmsOwPJpfMrFCZvnYopbISW-2FKFBxPXrzsUr0DQbbvJuc0XuZsPUNSA2ssqShQQ1Mn07EF5PwAu7g66-2Bdd1j27a7wvecp8uOoAwgLnE59yzT0HkW2QXH1KBX-2Fkq3X91F4PB3dS5rRYHBpZE-2FAx6-2FvfrRMWDiD-2FxhiYBGTehqQodNfhy3feWQ5T0O6sK1o6EVzz33lktrzkLrQrPscXbSRkWP-2B55no-2F/0sYu)
Friend, **** **** **** As we start off the New Year, I wanted to update you on what our campaign has accomplished in the first two weeks of 2020.
Last week, we officially launched our field program with the incredible leadership of our Field Director, Matthew Butler.

He led two volunteer kickoff meetings, in Westchester and Rockland Counties, where I met volunteers from all different backgrounds who not only believe in our vision, but who also are generously dedicating their time and energy to this campaign. We have run a people-powered campaign from the start and we will continue to grow as we move closer to Election Day.
[Donate to our Field Program »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IAE/ni0YAA/t.2ye/HXkU6LYFScKSZx0eqmcNYA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRIc8ctk0G-2B84LyI4ptr1FZgOUwMHXR7BfqLPmsOwPJrj2D3nB4oaGPLCZprE1dMXzJcmbXMNijjsUgjPlK7gNHsvtHsMPW9bwrPsi4HVSYPTQ-2FIF-2BPb6uBLjPyOrlpZgmJb6ry-2BmokQepKPM4tY6aU7AAklKIcs-2FLCYHP46cSM6J80DQBjkjHECX4YSjsMC4u2cTzWnJ6fEHdIFNMzCe68jveebus75MWWKyVkP7PqYiX1oUszIWc7xAEfcfbTpD/jz4-)
We took the energy from those two meetings and put in real work over the weekend, canvassing around Nyack and Sleepy Hollow, and speaking to voters around the district.

As I walked from door to door, I met so many people who had heard about the race and were excited about our campaign. The way we win this is by getting our message out to every voter in NY-17, one door and one conversation at a time.
In addition to hitting the doors this past week, we showed up for causes that matter to our campaign. This movement isn’t just about me, it’s about building a coalition of people committed to fighting for a more peaceful and just society.
On Thursday, I joined Concerned Families of Westchester at a peace rally in Hastings and spoke out against war with Iran.

I then shared my story and campaign message with the Cortlandt and Peekskill Democratic Committees, and participated in a forum where I answered questions and challenged the other candidates in the race to fight for the big, bold solutions that we need in this country.
Over the next six months, there will be many more rallies, more candidate debates, more meet and greets, and certainly more doors to knock. We’ve had a busy start to 2020 and I can’t wait to keep it going.
But I need your help. Will you pitch in right now so we can make this dream a reality?
[Donate $500 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/IAE/ni0YAA/t.2ye/HXkU6LYFScKSZx0eqmcNYA/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwRIc8ctk0G-2B84LyI4ptr1FZgOUwMHXR7BfqLPmsOwPJpWg44RcP-2Ft6WD2hPimSjkLy5Kh7CUbLboobeMtk13yVPDJG1AVULWQP1HHsD0pSLVK-2BgMAcEB73GUlhHPLFSt-2Ft0FXDSW95Q7LGKtvA5OlbFNgtJWSrPNSuVLh8K-2FG5FwmIKOmdIC6EfzYqWffMvmIcwdF7Zv5cdTQqPY7zl2EqGxupTn7DlIBwLEil2DjIPmymdai0UoS0ofkkppLybxZ/bwj-) clean_body: As we start off the New Year, I wanted to update you on what our campaign has accomplished in the first two weeks of 2020. | | | Friend, ** As we start off the New Year, I wanted to update you on what our campaign has accomplished in the first two weeks of 2020. Last week, we officially launched our field program with the incredible leadership of our Field Director, Matthew Butler. He led two volunteer kickoff meetings, in Westchester and Rockland Counties, where I met volunteers from all different backgrounds who not only believe in our vision, but who also are generously dedicating their time and energy to this campaign. We have run a people-powered campaign from the start and we will continue to grow as we move closer to Election Day. - We took the energy from those two meetings and put in real work over the weekend, canvassing around Nyack and Sleepy Hollow, and speaking to voters around the district. As I walked from door to door, I met so many people who had heard about the race and were excited about our campaign. The way we win this is by getting our message out to every voter in NY-17, one door and one conversation at a time. In addition to hitting the doors this past week, we showed up for causes that matter to our campaign. This movement isn’t just about me, it’s about building a coalition of people committed to fighting for a more peaceful and just society. On Thursday, I joined Concerned Families of Westchester at a peace rally in Hastings and spoke out against war with Iran. I then shared my story and campaign message with the Cortlandt and Peekskill Democratic Committees, and participated in a forum where I answered questions and challenged the other candidates in the race to fight for the big, bold solutions that we need in this country. Over the next six months, there will be many more rallies, more candidate debates, more meet and greets, and certainly more doors to knock. We’ve had a busy start to 2020 and I can’t wait to keep it going. But I need your help. Will you pitch in right now so we can make this dream a reality? - Thanks, Mondaire ** | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. name: Andrew Yang
subject: The first goal we ever missed, Yang Gang
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We’re about to miss a fundraising goal for the first time ever

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5854%2E377263%2EgiPjFk) Yang Gang --

Last week, we set a fundraising goal of $2 million by tonight at midnight!

We still have $868,071 to raise in 12 hours. Which means, for the first time in the history of our campaign, we could miss a fundraising goal at precisely the worst possible time.

**The media and nation are watching us closer than ever, so if we miss this goal it would be a big blow to our momentum right when polls show we’re rising in Iowa.

[Yang Gang, I’m personally asking you to chip in $10 or more right now to ensure we hit our $2 million goal. Can I count on you?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21903?t=5&akid=5854%2E377263%2EgiPjFk)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21903?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5854%2E377263%2EgiPjFk)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21903?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=5854%2E377263%2EgiPjFk)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21903?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=5854%2E377263%2EgiPjFk)
---
| | [$100 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21903?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=5854%2E377263%2EgiPjFk)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21903?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=5854%2E377263%2EgiPjFk)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21903?t=12&amount=25&akid=5854%2E377263%2EgiPjFk)
---
I’ll be honest, with only three weeks until voting starts in Iowa, missing such a critical goal would be difficult for our campaign.

The media will have a field day attacking us, if they don’t just dismiss us entirely. And we need every dollar to support our hard working staff and volunteers out in Iowa and New Hampshire knocking doors in 20 degree (and below!) weather.

**[We need to make sure we have the resources to support them and keep building our momentum. Chip in right now to show everyone that we WILL hit this goal by our deadline tonight. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21903?t=13&akid=5854%2E377263%2EgiPjFk)**
[Chip In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21903?t=14&akid=5854%2E377263%2EgiPjFk)
---
Let’s do this,

-Andrew
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Chip In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21903?t=6&akid=5854%2E377263%2EgiPjFk)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=5854%2E377263%2EgiPjFk) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5854%2E377263%2EgiPjFk) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 13 Years and 16,000 Pages—It’s Time to Fix It
body:
It took about 5 years from the start of construction to build the Hoover Dam, one of the modern world’s engineering marvels. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=28895fdf6d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **13 Years and 16,000 Pages—It’s Time to Fix It**

It took about 5 years from the start of construction to build the Hoover Dam, one of the modern world’s engineering marvels. Today, however, “even modest public works, including roads, bridges and airport runways, can spend years in limbo,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes.

A big culprit: “The National Environmental Policy Act, or NEPA. That 1970 law requires an environmental study of any major project that involves federal funding or permitting. NEPA hasn’t been overhauled in 40 years.” One 12-mile interstate expansion in Denver took 13 years, with a final report running 8,951 pages—plus 7,307 more in appendix.

President Trump recently proposed a new rule to fix that. “Characterizing the Democratic response as ‘knee jerk’ would be an insult to knees, or jerks, or both,” the editors write.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4e64f6963d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump was welcomed with overwhelming enthusiasm in the Mercedes-Benz Superdome Monday night before the college football national title game . . . Trump was shown on the dome's two big boards as he and his wife and first lady, Melania Trump, entered,” Andre Toran and Paul Myerberg report for [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8f1a52c9d4&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Deregulation has been an unsung success story of the Trump Administration. This week, “the Labor Department adds its ‘joint employer’ rule to the long list of deregulatory wins . . . The new rule we’re introducing updates one from 1958, which said joint employment exists when two employers are ‘not completely disassociated’ from each other. Little explanation was given for that legal test, leading to uncertainty, unnecessary litigation and divergent standards in different federal courts,” White House Acting Chief of Staff Mick Mulvaney and Labor Secretary Eugene Scalia write in [_**The Wall Street Journal**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6039745e4e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Senior Advisor to the President Jared Kushner visits Milwaukee today to discuss skills training for former inmates. “Kushner's visit follows the first anniversary of the First Step Act, legislation aimed at overhauling the criminal justice system in an effort to reduce the number of people in the nation’s prisons and help former inmates rejoin society,” Mary Spicuzza reports for the [_Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d5233f162&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump travels to Georgia today “to highlight and advance the administration’s work against human trafficking. She intends to tour two facilities on Tuesday that help survivors in downtown Atlanta.” Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar and other Administration officials will join her, Joshua Sharpe reports in [_The Atlanta Journal-Constitution_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f63b6e5660&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d58cf01c85&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6227394756&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c565d7c952)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

**Then: Dr. Barbara Bollier raised $1.1 million in the first quarter of her campaign (a fundraising record in Kansas)**

Now: _Inside Elections_ changed its rating of the election from _Strong Republican_ to _Lean Republican._

[**Let 's keep Dr. Bollier's momentum going in Kansas! name: J.D. Scholten
subject: A year ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

It’s sad to say that we’re not surprised when Steve King says something racist, hateful, or downright wrong.

After all, it was a year ago today that he was kicked off all his congressional committees by _his own party_ for saying “White nationalist, white supremacist, Western civilization -- how did that language become offensive?”

Since then, Steve King has done nothing to help his constituents facing shrinking markets and farm bankruptcies. He hasn’t defended us in the trade war, hasn’t stepped up to make the tax code work for our neighbors, and hasn’t lived up to the Iowa values that we live by here.

He spends his time on the House floor pushing conspiracy theories instead of fighting for us. **It’s time for him to go.**

**[Our mid-month fundraising deadline is coming up tomorrow. Can you chip in $5 or more right now to defeat Steve King and elect a representative who stands up for the people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13908275/145129024/-52674191?refcode=em20_200114_midmonthfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlNWExOS0xYzM3LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A9ZXArotPYZ_JN8Jy6tWJ3r3dy3br_J9nfLRvXTJcDg=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13908276/145129029/-52674191?refcode=em20_200114_midmonthfr&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlNWExOS0xYzM3LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A9ZXArotPYZ_JN8Jy6tWJ3r3dy3br_J9nfLRvXTJcDg=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13908277/145129042/-52674191?refcode=em20_200114_midmonthfr&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlNWExOS0xYzM3LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A9ZXArotPYZ_JN8Jy6tWJ3r3dy3br_J9nfLRvXTJcDg=)

In Congress, I promise to serve the people of my district honorably and treat all people with decency and respect. I will step up to the plate when it comes to negotiating trade deals, and I’ll make sure our schools and teachers have the resources they need to make sure our future generations of Iowans thrive.

I was born and raised in Iowa. My family raised me to believe that hard work, civility, and love of community are the values we should all aspire to -- **and that’s exactly what I’ll bring to Congress.**

**[So show that you care about these values: chip in $5 or more today to help us meet our mid-month fundraising goal and keep up the momentum to beat Steve King this fall.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13908282/145129106/-52674191?refcode=em20_200114_midmonthfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmNlNWExOS0xYzM3LWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A9ZXArotPYZ_JN8Jy6tWJ3r3dy3br_J9nfLRvXTJcDg=)**

J.D. Scholten

clean_body: Peter -- It’s sad to say that we’re not surprised when Steve King says something racist, hateful, or downright wrong. After all, it was a year ago today that he was kicked off all his congressional committees by his own party for saying “White nationalist, white supremacist, Western civilization -- how did that language become offensive?” Since then, Steve King has done nothing to help his constituents facing shrinking markets and farm bankruptcies. He hasn’t defended us in the trade war, hasn’t stepped up to make the tax code work for our neighbors, and hasn’t lived up to the Iowa values that we live by here. He spends his time on the House floor pushing conspiracy theories instead of fighting for us. It’s time for him to go. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In Congress, I promise to serve the people of my district honorably and treat all people with decency and respect. I will step up to the plate when it comes to negotiating trade deals, and I’ll make sure our schools and teachers have the resources they need to make sure our future generations of Iowans thrive. I was born and raised in Iowa. My family raised me to believe that hard work, civility, and love of community are the values we should all aspire to -- and that’s exactly what I’ll bring to Congress. = Standing Tall for All, J.D. Scholten =

body:
Friends, Today, I will be hosting an _exclusive_ campaign meet and greet at On Sight Shooting.
The radical Democrats running for President want to strip us of our 2nd Amendment right. That will not happen under my watch.
As a 4-H certified pistol and shotgun coach, I understand the importance of the **right to bear arms.**
***All attendees will be entered into a sweepstakes to win a Tristar Arms Viper G2 Bronze 12 Gauge Semi-Automatic Shotgun***
Friends, we must stand united in the fight to preserve and protect the 2nd Amendment.
Looking forward to seeing y'all at On Sight Shooting today at 5:00 PM.
On Sight Shooting address: 2461 E Florence Blvd Suite #1, Casa Grande, Arizona 85194
Furthermore, if you have any questions please feel free to reach out to my political director, Carter at [carter@sheddforcongress.com ](mailto:carter@sheddforcongress.com "carter@sheddforcongress.com ")
See you soon,
Tiffany Shedd

name: Team Kennedy
subject: This is why we need Senators like Joe.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
|
---
| | Hey Just wanted to make sure you saw Joe's message yesterday. With the impeachment trial coming, the whole country's getting a chance to see just how much Mitch McConnell's been able to weaken our democracy. We need Senators who'll stand up to McConnell and fight for _us_ , not wealthy special interests - and definitely not Donald Trump. Senators like Joe. **That's what this movement's about: getting the Senate to work for the people it is supposed to represent. ** That's why we're growing every day, and picking up speed as we go. **[Chip in now and let's take the fight to Mitch McConnell!](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902cd/55b66746/2d9c94ea/80f9c37/2477312548/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-01-14-mcconnell&recurring=1&amount=3")** [donate now and fuel the fight!](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902cd/55b66746/2d9c94ea/80f9c37/2477312548/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-01-14-mcconnell&recurring=1&amount=3") _Team Kennedy_ Forwarded Message [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902cd/55b66746/2d9c94ea/80f9c30/2477312548/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/") **Mitch McConnell is leading a broken Senate. Every day he's in charge, he makes the damage worse.** The Senate has become a place where good ideas go to die. Gun safety, election security, campaign finance reform, protections for LGBTQIA+ rights, the Violence Against Women Act, raising the minimum wage, and any meaningful effort to tackle our climate crisis. Rather than passing legislation to actually help people, they are spending their days packing the courts with right-wing judges. Making it harder for Americans to get health care. And plotting to rig the impeachment process to protect President Trump. This falls completely on Mitch McConnell's shoulders. It's what he wants. **Mitch McConnell is only interested in protecting his own power, even at the expense of the American people and our Democracy. I refuse to let that continue. We must stand up to him.** **[We must fight. Contribute $3 so we can win this Senate race and take on Mitch McConnell in the Senate.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902cd/55b66746/2d9c94ea/80f9c37/2477312548/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-01-14-mcconnell&recurring=1&amount=3")** We will fight to get dark money out of our elections. We will fight to abolish the outdated and unjust Electoral College. We will fight to secure our elections from hostile foreign powers and expand voting rights. We will stay laser-focused on the structural inequities that keep McConnell in power while regular Americans are locked out, let down and left behind. **_And we will take our case directly to the American people, who want a Senate that works for them, not for Mitch McConnell._** **But before we are able to take him on, we have to win in Massachusetts.** **[So I'm asking you to make a $3 contribution to help fuel our campaign- so we can win, and then take on Mitch McConnell together.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902cd/55b66746/2d9c94ea/80f9c37/2477312548/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-01-14-mcconnell&recurring=1&amount=3")** _Joe_ [contribute](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902cd/55b66746/2d9c94ea/80f9c37/2477312548/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-01-14-mcconnell&recurring=1&amount=3") |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902cd/55b66746/2d9c94ea/80f9c31/2477312548/VEsB/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [**Switch to our less email option here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902cd/55b66746/2d9c94ea/80f9c32/2477312548/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com; [click here to change your email address](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902cd/55b66746/2d9c94ea/80f9c33/2477312548/VEsP/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/update-address/")If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, [click here to get off all our lists instantly.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902cd/55b66746/2d9c94ea/80f9c3c/2477312548/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? [**Contact us here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902cd/55b66746/2d9c94ea/80f9c3d/2477312548/VEsHBA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/contact/"). |

Yesterday we launched a mid-month goal to fund our critical work in the final weeks before the Iowa caucuses.

Our goal is to raise $750,000 in three days. Thanks to grassroots donors, we saw a great response yesterday. But today is a new day, and we really need a surge of support in order to hit this goal.

**If 134 people from Pennsylvania chip in $23 (our average contribution) now, we'll stay on track to hitting our goal by tomorrow. But not everyone reading this will donate. That's why we're relying on you.**

[**Can you be one of the 134 today to help hit our goal by the deadline? $23 (or any amount) you can chip in today would go a long way.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a4af/45c30650/1ec8e697f/66ffc2aa/2059946476/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU41OEZfREVCX01DR19DXzIwMjAwMTE0X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN58F_DEB_MCG_C_20200114_V1S1_P")

name: Team Collins
subject: 🚨 False ad Alert 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
Sara Gideon's "Dark Money" Allies Launch Yet Another Attack on Senator Collins' Record
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_****_
**_FALSE AD ALERT:_**
**Sara Gideon 's "Dark Money" Allies Launch Yet Another Attack on Senator Collins' Record**
**_Ad claims Collins sides with big pharma over Mainers; facts show otherwise_**
**Bangor, ME** - Yet another far-left "dark money" group associated with Chuck Schumer and Maine Speaker of the House Sara Gideon is skirting federal election laws to launch a false attack on Senator Susan Collins' record.
According to the newspaper, [_Roll Call_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0), Majority Forward is a "non-profit arm of the Senate Majority PAC, which is aligned with Senate Democratic leadership." Just like Maine Momentum, [which has already been discredited](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) by the _Washington Post 's_ non-partisan fact checker for having a history of making false claims, Majority Forward refuses to disclose its donors. It's registered with the IRS as a 501(c)(4) and, as such, is legally prohibited from political activity - yet, as _Roll Call_ reports, the group this week launched a "statewide six-figure TV and digital ad" aimed squarely at misleading Maine voters about Senator Collins' record of working to lower the costs of prescription drugs.
In this ad, the group cites three very specific votes and claims Senator Collins voted against measures to lower prescription drug prices. However, what the group doesn't tell you is that opposition to these specific measures was bipartisan. In fact, one of the provisions that Senator Collins voted against was also opposed by former Democratic Majority Leader Harry Reid and Patty Murray, the current Democratic leader of the Senate Health Committee.
This is how "dark money" groups like Majority Forward work - they "cherry pick" specific votes and they don't tell you the whole story because they hope that you won't seek the truth.
**But here is the truth:** **SENATOR COLLINS IS WORKING TIRELESSLY TO BRING DOWN PRESCRIPTION DRUG PRICES.**
These are just a few of her most recent accomplishments:
* As Chairman of the Senate Aging Committee, Senator Collins led the first bipartisan investigation into the abrupt price increases in certain off-patent prescription drugs. During the year-long investigation, she chaired multiple Senate hearings and subpoenaed pharmaceutical executives to testify. Senator Collins' extensive investigation resulted in an in-depth report and policy recommendations as reported by [the _New York Times._](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
* In October 2018, the President signed two bills into law that Senator Collins authored which prohibits a practice known as ["gag clauses"](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) that prevented patients from knowing the cheapest way to pay for a prescription drug.
* In 2017, legislation that Senator Collins authored [was signed into law](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) that makes it easier for generic drug manufacturers to enter the market and compete to reduce prices of prescription drugs for patients.
* Senator Collins [has chaired Senate hearings](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) focused on the rising costs of treatments for people with rheumatoid arthritis, and addressing the soaring costs of insulin for people with [diabetes.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=32&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
* As founder and co-chair of the Senate Diabetes Caucus, Senator Collins has teamed up with Democratic Senator Jeanne Shaheen (D-New Hampshire) to introduce the [**Insulin Price Reduction Act**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) that would reduce insulin prices by an estimated 75-percent.

Senator Collins' work is not done. She is committed to continuing her efforts to bring down prescription drug costs. Most recently, she announced strong support for a bipartisan bill from Senators Chuck Grassley (R-Iowa) and Ron Wyden (D-Oregon) called [**the Prescription Drug Pricing Reduction Act**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0), that would reduce out-of-pocket costs at the pharmacy counter.
But, these "dark money" groups with ambiguous names like "Majority Forward" and "Maine Momentum" don't care about the truth. The goal of these far-left allies of Chuck Schumer and Sara Gideon, who the [**Maine Ethics Commission found guilty**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) of violating federal campaign finance laws involving straw donations and corporate money, is to fill the airwaves with deceptive ads funded by unknown, often out-of-state, sources in an attempt to deceive voters here in Maine. **Don 't be fooled.**

[Donate](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
_****_
_****_
[
SusanCollins.com
](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Paid for by Collins for Senator
---

[Privacy Policy](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDE1Mzk4NzgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMwOTc1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: Tell Senate Republicans: We demand a fair impeachment trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Congressional Republicans aren't even trying to hide their corruption and collusion with the White House. During the House hearings, they stormed secure hearing rooms, tried to expose the name of the whistleblower, and complained at every turn that the process was unfair to the president after he refused to participate in it. Now, the Senate, led by Mitch McConnell and Lindsey Graham, are touting their close coordination with Trump and desire to exonerate him before they've even received the articles of impeachment, let alone started the trial. They refuse to see new evidence, read the transcripts, or hear from new witnesses. What we're about to see is a sham trial that will only serve to further erode our institutions and our democracy. [**We need engaged Democrats to join us in calling on the Senate to stop these shenanigans and hold a fair trial. We 're looking to have 10,000 names next to ours by the end of the day, so please add yours NOW>>**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfc9/6e9863e8/17d0ce6e/1db04341/1367989178/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/impeachment-trial/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing with us, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfc9/6e9863e8/17d0ce6e/1db04341/1367989178/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/impeachment-trial/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

Leo already held a high-dollar fundraiser for Susan Collins in his $4 million summer mansion. There's no telling how many millions he will spend now that he has this new dark money operation at his disposal.
We'll need to generate a LOT of individual donations in order to keep up - especially since we're not taking any money from corporate PACs. That's where you come in.
_\- Team Sara_

body:
We'll start with the good news.

|

| | **We 'll give you the good news first, Peter:**

_More than 25,000 individual supporters have donated to propel this campaign!_ Folks across Texas and beyond are stepping up because they believe in the values we're working to bring to DC -- like strength, equality, and independence. **[Will you join them in supporting this campaign and become a 2020 member today?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489077f/7f51f7bc/4a891cd3/4ef0159d/791578347/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc1NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-activate?refcode=email_20200114.2nd__754__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Mike
subject: I want to hear from you re: foreign policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
It's critical for me to hear from voters -- especially on such an important issue -- so that my experience in the field is sympatico with the beliefs of Iowans.
|
---

| | Greetings, folks -- Did you see my survey from last week? I want to hear your thoughts on our foreign policy. It's critical for me to hear from voters -- especially on such an important issue -- so that my experience in the field is sympatico with the beliefs of Iowans. So take a close look at this link and send me your thoughts: [https://act.frankenforiowa.org/foreign-policy-survey](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24cd/33365068/4a6f1f6d/3f8b9dec/3443632415/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/foreign-policy-survey?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mfranken&utm_content=1+-+httpsactfrankenforiowaorgforeignpolicysu&utm_campaign=FRA_20200114_fpsurveykick_em_su_all&source=FRA_20200114_fpsurveykick_em_su_all") Thank you, Mike \--------Forwarded Message--------
From: Franken Policy Team
Subject: Mike wants to hear from you on foreign policy
Date: Wednesday, January 8, 2020 Hi team: The Admiral has discussed and commented on the airstrike that killed Iranian General Soleimani in Iraq last week. His private conversations with us about relations between the US and Middle Eastern nations are quite fascinating. Here's a quick summation:
* The Trump administration acts without an identifiable strategy
* Utterances from the White House, often well-removed from reality or legality, add to the confused state of our foreign relations
* Dubious decision-making, from stepping away from a host of international agreements (Paris Accord, JCPOA, a host of trade agreements, NAFTA, and more) with no replacement serves to advantage other nations, like Russia, over the US
* Coincidently to this, the GOP has not offered a whiff of responsibility to reign in the Executive.

Mike's decades of foreign policy experience, from his time in strategy and policy postings and as a flag officer in the Navy, makes him the ideal Senator to lasso the dangerous and reckless tendencies of the White House. But he wants to hear from you, can you answer a few questions on U.S. foreign policy? [**Click here to take our survey.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24cd/33365068/4a6f1f6d/3f8b9ded/3443632415/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/foreign-policy-survey?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mfranken&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+take+our+survey&utm_campaign=FRA_20200114_fpsurveykick_em_su_all&source=FRA_20200114_fpsurveykick_em_su_all") | [Take the Survey >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24cd/33365068/4a6f1f6d/3f8b9dee/3443632415/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/foreign-policy-survey?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mfranken&utm_content=3+-+Take+the+Survey+gtgt&utm_campaign=FRA_20200114_fpsurveykick_em_su_all&source=FRA_20200114_fpsurveykick_em_su_all")
---

Thank you,
Franken Policy Team

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24cd/33365068/4a6f1f6d/3f8b9def/3443632415/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200114_fpsurveykick_em_su_ftr&amount=15&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mfranken&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+gtgt&utm_campaign=FRA_20200114_fpsurveykick_em_su_all&source=FRA_20200114_fpsurveykick_em_su_all")

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: Criminals on the streets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
In Albany, Governor Cuomo and far-left Democrats are letting criminals go free after passing sweeping bail reform. What do you think? | |
---
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=39a71de8630542eb8b11b679d6faa356&_e=qgMB5tXmQD6TFr0VAyzcQkQPCAkSop3QotsyUiT3RK83-y4hlaXzTwOU0dXxoV9Y-AfZr-kmD5cpWeahwzxBf6fy4I3LtQx5a6kSZMHczNCxLauF-iBSpboR9GFBLzHgV8_uM1NJPnLM3mfCFcARGpSP5iNELrnhjWt13fOLLIwxtt_6ket2WflZPn-h-ZXBsxoABNqGxFbMoMbHgT-00TKJzS03vMUKKxuGfBt9ZBl8MZCramkY-73UgE-g1SLpnLAiGIw2mDuHnltyW-tHqW6Zjck5SflDjuV3ce5Umc-OLjSfeKB1KbrGnClW1-lF3U8qN2Y9uNi0hHO1j7-XkjGyap0BvEL8pRxjor69a-97auGznYG-6WwGESAg9bloT-Y-8zg9LxqTaUE_5-1lVJXj3I7Y396gOta3qogh_938iLx_tPBzIpV-LWLMl3jX)
|
---
Peter,

Every day, there are new stories of dangerous criminals who are now roaming the streets thanks to dangerous bail reform policies implemented by Anthony Brindisi’s closest ally in Albany, Governor Cuomo and the out of control Democrats in Albany.

So far, robbers, murderers, and drunken hit-and-run drivers have been set free under bail reform. Unsurprisingly, many of those released have committed more crimes.

This issue affects everyone in New York, so we need to hear from you directly.

**Sign our petition if you oppose New York’s short-sighted, dangerous bail reform law! **
[ **Add your name!** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=39a71de8630542eb8b11b679d6faa356&_e=qgMB5tXmQD6TFr0VAyzcQkQPCAkSop3QotsyUiT3RK83-y4hlaXzTwOU0dXxoV9Y-AfZr-kmD5cpWeahwzxBf6fy4I3LtQx5a6kSZMHczNCxLauF-iBSpboR9GFBLzHgV8_uM1NJPnLM3mfCFcARGpSP5iNELrnhjWt13fOLLIwxtt_6ket2WflZPn-h-ZXBsxoABNqGxFbMoMbHgT-00TKJzS03vMUKKxuGfBt9ZBnzKsR_PIbYoFgaIJ7OGJsvPp3wYhje4wOWGNZLDRvYHcZMiFtwI06ycj7GGtT1vOTRiNqpAecsiHMk2t7cYIjnzFCP_cXqXiNmcIpHzPcZnhjWdnsgUdLOxrCUftk3S7ikyWcYOGbe2UDRQlyx85N7Sn1nT_J6_GgqmR85_j3XANcGPiaf1UuyADJf-nXrh8SU0UU8GAve4Xx0V03Wam9O)
Instead of trusting New York’s law enforcement and judges, liberal Democrats in Albany upended the criminal justice system with soft-on-crime bail reform. As a result, these criminals’ victims and the general public are at risk, and the authorities responsible for holding them accountable have been constrained.

The General Assembly rushed to craft dangerous, headline-grabbing reforms instead of working with law enforcement officials to craft a policy that would make public safety a top priority. The future of our state is at risk thanks to short-sighted and dysfunctional actions in Albany.

**Because this policy is so dangerous, we need signatures from 5,000 New Yorkers by midnight!**
