Make your voice heard on bail reform now: **[https://secure.winred.com/tenney-for-congress/](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=39a71de8630542eb8b11b679d6faa356&_e=qgMB5tXmQD6TFr0VAyzcQkQPCAkSop3QotsyUiT3RK83-y4hlaXzTwOU0dXxoV9Y-AfZr-kmD5cpWeahwzxBf6fy4I3LtQx5a6kSZMHczNCxLauF-iBSpboR9GFBLzHgV8_uM1NJPnLM3mfCFcARGpSP5iNELrnhjWt13fOLLIwxtt_6ket2WflZPn-h-ZXBsxoABNqGxFbMoMbHgT-00TKJzS03vMUKKxuGfBt9ZBldF6yzIdEzYq5LD6l7t5ud5CrM6Lb7xFlfQHOt94mx7af1T-wOK8x0v2m4Cr-7-1Cd2yB1gt1wW4i_NlAfVLzDQFHXJatYSdylZfhgNYe4HpYBtiRl85lUKBMooH_d_8ZAFQPJfT3mb9dkL0SEDGFo-7Ec-sChpRqP7rqHcZE7yICjjZc1sWAKfqTB9nmZ6LJrmWR7yko0T-a-8LgBTa5L)**

name: Team Marsha
subject: Tonight, in Iowa...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
It's clear that the Democrats are unfit to govern, insistent on playing political games with the American people and our government. It's unacceptable and we need to show the Left that not only will we not stand for it, but we stand tall and proud with our president, Donald J. Trump.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt8112.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDE1NDE1NjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMyMDI3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
****
****

_... Six of the Democratic presidential candidates will take the stage at Drake University in Des Moines. _

The Left's field has narrowed since the last debate, but among those left standing are some of the most radical, progressive candidates in modern history.

>From the past several months of previous debates, we already know what they're going to talk about:

\- Socialized medicine, including _**Medicare for All**_

\- _**Opening up our borders**_ and providing benefits to illegal immigrants

\- _**Increasing your taxes**_ to pay for costly social programs that will only compound the issues we face today

\- And most importantly, _**doing everything --quite literally everything--to obstruct President Trump's legacy and progress, and remove him from office**_

Peter, after Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats moved in what they labeled as an "urgent" impeachment vote, they are now planning to vote to send the Articles of Impeachment over to the Senate tomorrow, **28 days after the first vote took place!**

**It 's clear that the Democrats are unfit to govern, insistent on playing political games with the American people and our government.**

It's unacceptable and we need to show the Left that not only will we not stand for it, but we stand tall and proud with our president, Donald J. Trump.

Will you sign our petition to show President Trump we stand with him in solidarity against the Democrats' games?

********[STAND WITH TRUMP](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt8112.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDE1NDE1NjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY4MTMyMDI3MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)********

subject: Do you approve of Trump's handling of Iran?

body:

name: Wendy Davis
subject: What Chip Roy said:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
Chip can call me whatever names he wants. This isn't about me.
| | |
---
|
---
_"Wendy Davis is a national abortion celebrity."
- GOP Extremist Chip Roy_
|
---
Friend: I was recently forwarded an email that my opponent, Chip Roy, sent around to his supporters, in which he called me a "national abortion celebrity."
I've got a few things to say about that:
* **I stood on the floor of the Texas Senate for 13 hours to defend reproductive rights on behalf of all the women who have been silenced or ignored.** Chip Roy refuses to listen to women, like me, who have made a gut-wrenching decision to end a pregnancy and who know it's a deeply personal health decision. It would be an act of utter cruelty to take that choice away.

* **I'm running for Congress today to fight for all the women out there who are _still _being silenced and ignored.** I don't want my granddaughters, and all the girls out there like them, to live a life where somebody else gets to decide what happens to their bodies. I will never, _never_ stop fighting for every woman's voice to be heard.

* **And if all that makes me a "national abortion celebrity" as Chip Roy called me ... well, then put me on the cover of _Us Weekly_.** Chip can call me whatever names he wants. This isn't about me. This is about all the women out there who deserve to be heard and whose freedom to bodily autonomy must be defended. We're in this together - and we're in it to win.

Friend, you can help us get there. My team set a goal to raise another $6,100 before midnight tonight to win in Texas and expand our Democratic majority in the house. But right now, we're falling $3,200 short of our goal:

**[If you think we should kick anti-choice extremists like Chip out of Congress and flip this seat blue, please rush a contribution of $3 or more- whatever you can spare - by midnight tonight.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ae6/704929dc/16118128/3993892f/2761716559/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2RmY19lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNTUtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk55-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
| | | [DONATE $3](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk55-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&express_lane=true&amount=3")
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk55-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk55-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
| | [Other](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ae6/704929dc/16118128/3993892f/2761716559/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2RmY19lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNTUtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email?refcode=jtk55-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")

The road ahead isn't easy - but this fight truly matters. Thank you for being a part of a team that believes that women's voices matter.

Wendy
| If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can **[click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ae6/704929dc/16118128/39938922/2761716559/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter")**. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ae6/704929dc/16118128/39938925/2761716559/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails"). [To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ae6/704929dc/16118128/39938924/2761716559/VEsO/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe") | Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress

body:

Now look, I don't mean to be negative, but if we don't reach our very first fundraising goal of 2020, it would send a message to the GOP that Minnesota is ripe for the taking. **We can't let that happen, folks.**

**Donate now to help us reach our very first goal of 2020 so we can build a winning campaign to fight back against the GOP, keep Minnesota blue, and flip the Senate. Let's do this.**

At that time, our team will hunker down, do the math, and determine whether or not we're on track for the rest of the month. Right now, we're still a bit behind on reaching our grassroots goal, so I'm asking if you'll add a donation of whatever you can afford right now to help us reach it. Anything you can give will go a long way. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" Under Mitch McConnell's leadership, we've had to put up with a Senate where good ideas go to die because he's been too busy working for the special interests who fill his campaign coffers and doing zilch for the American people. The good news is: Democrats have a real shot at flipping the majority and putting power back in the hands of the people. And that starts right here in Minnesota. Now look, I don't mean to be negative, but if we don't reach our very first fundraising goal of 2020, it would send a message to the GOP that Minnesota is ripe for the taking. We can't let that happen, folks. Donate now to help us reach our very first goal of 2020 so we can build a winning campaign to fight back against the GOP, keep Minnesota blue, and flip the Senate. Let's do this. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" I can't tell you how grateful I am to have folks like you by my side. You make all the difference in this tough fight. Thank you. -- Tina

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Thank you, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- Just a few moments ago, our campaign announced our record fundraising total for the fourth quarter, and I wanted to share the news with you, too. **According to our team, we raised $2.8 million in the last three months! This quarterly total sets a record for Senate campaigns in Colorado in the off-year.** And here's the best part -- we did it the right way. 93% of our contributions were $200 or less with an average grassroots donation of just $26 -- a true sign of our strength. We also collected contributions from _every_ county in Colorado last year! I'm very proud of that. Our campaign took no money from corporate PACs. Instead, we raised our resources from teachers, nurses, farmers, ranchers, a cheesemaker, a babysitter, and even a few of my fellow brewers chipped in. I am so proud of the campaign we're building together to flip this Senate seat, and you should be as well, folks. **But winning this election is going to take more than one historic fundraising period in the off-year. We 're going to need all hands on deck to beat Cory Gardner.** We are going to have to keep at it and continue speaking out about the issues and solutions that matter to working people, like lowering health care and prescription drug costs, keeping our families safe from gun violence, and combating climate change. So, this week, if you can afford to step up again for our campaign, I would greatly appreciate it. We know our GOP opponent is going to have the support of every right-wing donor in Trump and McConnell's network, and we cannot slow down if we're going to flip this seat. **Can I count on you to make a contribution to our grassroots Senate campaign in Colorado today? The work we do in the next few weeks could determine the outcome of this race, so let 's make certain we have the resources needed to win this critical election.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200114-numbers?refcode=em-200114-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

---

I want to thank each and every one of you for hitching your wagon to our grassroots campaign. There are no guarantees, but I believe this team will carry us to victory this coming November and, together, we can take back our government and flip this Senate seat.
All my best,
-- John

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: Can Elizabeth count on you to host a phone bank this weekend? We've set our biggest call goal yet, and we need your help:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We have a plan to make one million calls this weekend, and we can't reach our goal without supporters like you. Will you help us reach our goal? | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a4a5/45c30650/1ec690dea/66ffccdb/4153336142/VEsH/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/call")
---
We've set our biggest goal yet -- **to make one million calls to voters and caucus-goers this weekend.**

**[To hit our ambitious goal of one million calls, we need 24 supporters in Pennsylvania to step up and host a phone bank this weekend. Can Elizabeth count on you to bring your friends and neighbors together to help us hit this big goal?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a4a5/45c30650/1ec690dea/66ffccda/4153336142/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbWFpbC0yMDIwMDExNC1waG9uZWJhbmtob3N0LXYxczIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/distributed-phone-bank-january-2020?source=email-20200114-phonebankhost-v1s2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Hosting a phone bank is simple -- you can host one anywhere with internet access and a place to sit. Our team will reach out to help you plan every step of the way, and we can help invite your neighbors and fellow supporters, too. We just need you to say yes.

**Big, structural change doesn 't happen unless we fight for it. Let us know we can count on you to host a phone bank in Cresco, and we'll be in touch soon to help you plan it.** | **[**I'LL HOST**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a4a5/45c30650/1ec690dea/66ffccda/4153336142/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbWFpbC0yMDIwMDExNC1waG9uZWJhbmtob3N0LXYxczIifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/distributed-phone-bank-january-2020?source=email-20200114-phonebankhost-v1s2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**
---

With only 20 days until the Iowa caucuses, calling caucus-goers and voters is one of the most important things you can do right now to help us win. And supporters like you will make it happen.

Thanks for being in this fight with us,

Team Warren

**Want to help out now? Make calls from home (or anywhere with an internet connection) now:**

| **[**MAKE CALLS NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a4a5/45c30650/1ec690dea/66ffccdd/4153336142/VEsC/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.elizabethwarren.com/call")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Nasty Nancy said what?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
You can't make this stuff up... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2fdeed405c7a/nasty-nancy-said-what?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Hi ,

Just hours after President Trump authorized the airstrike that took out Qasem Soleimani, Pelosi snarked “this action was taken without the consultation of the Congress.”

The leader of the free world uses military force to kill a **sadistic, mass-murdering terrorist** and Nasty Nancy **whines about not being briefed beforehand?**

You’ve got to be kidding me.

Just look at how BACKWARDS the progressive and socialist Democrats in Congress are – you’re probably just as tired as I am of hearing them celebrate the evil Soleimani as a global leader. **No wonder President Trump acted within his right to not brief them first!**

Here’s the deal: in order for us to help President Trump continue Keeping America Great, **we must win back Congress.**

President Trump’s legacy of fearlessly protecting national security, securing our borders, creating jobs, and defending the unborn can **only last** if you and I take back the House of Representatives.

---
| [I support Kathaleen and President Trump](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=8d63d4a524&e=01c99b7fbd "I support Kathaleen and President Trump")
---
| You are just like every other voter in your neighborhood – you listen to the radio, you watch TV, and you stay connected with your friends on social media.

**And that is why we just launched new ads on each one of those platforms!**
---
| [ ](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=208d16ebfb&e=01c99b7fbd "It takes a Wall...")
---
|
But – **ads AREN’T CHEAP!**

Will you give a gift of...

---
| [$25 for a radio ad placement](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=f47365fd2c&e=01c99b7fbd "$25 for a radio ad placement")

---

| With your generous support, I’ll make my way to the swamp to help President Trump protect our national security both at home and abroad.

Together, we will keep Texas red and preserve our conservative values.

For liberty,

Kathaleen Wall

name: Laura Loomer
subject: VIDEO: They want to “Re-Educate” us
body:
This morning James O’Keefe and his group, Project Veritas released a video from the bowels of the Bernie Sanders campaign.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-360452-843091-4819683-6b2158d6c1-4bfae7d2a4)
Patriot,

This morning James O’Keefe and his group, Project Veritas released a video from the bowels of the Bernie Sanders campaign.

The footage is shocking and I can say from my firsthand experience that it represents the mindset of the Radical Left.

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-360452-843091-4819682-55531fcd4d-4bfae7d2a4)
They are filled with hate, they are violent, and think of us as less than human. They call us “Nazis” because when debating Liberty against Socialism, Liberty ALWAYS wins.

BTW, this is why so many conservatives are banned on social media. Leftists can never win an honest debate so they get triggered and work to silence us.

Before you watch the video, I want to give you a little background.

I started my investigative journalist career with Project Veritas.

I went undercover with Hillary Clinton’s campaign and saw the Democrat Establishment version of this type of behavior.

Laura Loomer

subject: New York Times admits President Trump’s maximum pressure on Iran is working
body:
The world’s worst terrorist, Qasem Soleimani, met his end on January 3. On President Donald J. Trump’s order, the U.S. military... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ab4db98dc9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 14, 2020
---
| | |
# **_New York Times_****admits President Trump’s maximum pressure on Iran is working**

**The world’s worst terrorist** , Qasem Soleimani, met his end on January 3. On President Donald J. Trump’s order, the U.S. military executed a flawless strike on Soleimani to keep Americans safe from this mass murderer—who had plans to kill again.

**As President Trump promised** , the maximum pressure campaign on Iran is now increasing. New sanctions announced last week are targeting the regime’s last remaining sources of export revenue, which Iran’s leaders used to fund terrorism around the world.

**President Trump:** [It’s a disgrace that anyone defends Soleimani](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9426f5abce&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Today, I am holding** the Iranian regime responsible for attacks against United States personnel and interests by denying it substantial revenue that may be used to fund and support its nuclear program, missile development, terrorism and terrorist proxy networks, and malign regional influence,” the President said.

**These measures** will specifically target pivotal industries such as construction, manufacturing, and mining. Any person who puts profits over peace by doing business with these prohibited sectors in Iran will be hit with powerful secondary sanctions.

**“These punishing** economic sanctions will remain until the Iranian regime changes its behavior,” the President added.

**Peace through strength** —the bedrock of President Trump’s foreign policy—rejects appeasement and seeks creative diplomacy backed by a strong negotiating position. Giving a violent regime money and ignoring its bad behavior, as the failed Iran nuclear deal did, never works. Iran’s leaders must know that terrorism is totally off the table.

**The good news** is that under President Trump, America _is_ negotiating from a position of strength. Our economy is booming, with the unemployment rate at a 50-year low and our energy sector leading the world in oil and natural gas production. Iran, buckling under the weight of American-led sanctions, is headed in the opposite direction.

**_The New York Times_** confirmed those basic facts just yesterday. “Iran’s Grim Economy Limits Its Willingness to Confront the U.S.,” its headline read. “Fearful of public anger over a plunging economy, Iran’s leaders appear to be turning inward, pulling back from escalation.”

**President Trump is standing** with the Iranian people in that fight. Over the weekend, the President delivered a public call of support for protesters in Iran. The message, written in both English and Farsi, became [“the most liked Persian tweet”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b39cf65e4d&e=3ee4985eea) ever.

**“To the brave, long-suffering** people of Iran: I've stood with you since the beginning of my Presidency, and my Administration will continue to stand with you. We are following your protests closely, and are inspired by your courage.”

[“The elite narrative on Iran brushes aside the fury of the Iranian people.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=04d9a3aec5&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬** **Press Secretary:** [The people of Iran have President Trump’s full support](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8c0904b0d8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump heads to the “Badger State”**

**The President is in** **Wisconsin** tonight, a state where workers and families have felt the lasting effects of America’s working-class boom:
* Since the 2016 election, Wisconsin’s unemployment rate has fallen to 3.3 percent as of November—below even the decades-best U.S. average of 3.5 percent.

* Monthly claims for unemployment insurance in the state have fallen by 18.8 percent since the election, as well.

* Nominal average hourly earnings for all private employees in Wisconsin have grown 3.5 percent year-over-year, as of November.

* Blue-collar workers have experienced big wage gains: The goods-producing and manufacturing industries have seen increases of 4.6 and 4 percent, respectively.

[MORE: Jared Kushner visits Milwaukee to discuss prison reentry programs](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=211d95ed74&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

|
---

| **President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump at the College Football Playoff National Championship** | January 13, 2020
